summary: Tested damage-related features for RentalHub. All 10 backend tests passed. Backend APIs correctly return has_damage_items, damage_items_count, damage_photos on issue cards and has_damage_history, damage_history on order items. Frontend code verified to have correct data-testid attributes for damage warning icons and badges.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard_overview.py lines 196-250: Correctly enriches issue cards with damage info via batch query to product_damage_history table
orders.py lines 143-171: Correctly enriches order items with damage_history and has_damage_history fields
ZoneItemsList.jsx line 173-179: Correctly renders inline warning SVG icon with data-testid='damage-warning-*' when item.has_damage_history is true
ManagerDashboard.jsx line 652: Correctly renders return-damage-badge with data-testid='return-damage-badge-*' when card.has_damage_items is true
ManagerDashboard.jsx line 783-832: DamagePhotoViewer component correctly implemented with modal overlay and photo grid
ManagerDashboard.jsx line 913: OrderCard correctly renders damage-badge with data-testid='damage-badge-*' when hasDamage is true
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: Order 7386 has 2 items with damage history (Тумба 80 см, Тумба 100 см). Dashboard has 43+ issue cards with has_damage_items=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Damage features fully implemented and tested. Backend returns damage fields correctly. Frontend has all required data-testid attributes. Order 7386 is a good test case with damage history. Dashboard shows 0 orders in 'Повернення' column because no 'issued' status cards have damage - this is expected behavior.

verified_features.dashboard_overview_damage_fields: PASS - Returns has_damage_items, damage_items_count, damage_photos on issue cards
verified_features.order_details_damage_history: PASS - Returns has_damage_history and damage_history on items
verified_features.damage_enrichment_batch_query: PASS - Uses efficient batch query to product_damage_history table
verified_features.damage_photos_limited_to_6: PASS - damage_photos array limited to 6 per card
verified_features.zone_items_list_warning_icon: PASS - Renders inline warning SVG with data-testid='damage-warning-*'
verified_features.manager_dashboard_damage_badge: PASS - Renders damage badge with data-testid='damage-badge-*'
verified_features.damage_photo_viewer_modal: PASS - DamagePhotoViewer component with overlay and close button

api_verification.GET /api/manager/dashboard/overview: 200 OK - Returns issue_cards with damage fields
api_verification.GET /api/orders/7386: 200 OK - Returns items with has_damage_history and damage_history
